name: Cyanex
description: Sentient tech merges with Corpus design to deliver this lethal sidearm. Fully automatic, it fires ricocheting, homing projectiles that release small clouds of <DT_GAS_COLOR>Gas on impact. Alt-fire to release the entire magazine without homing as a single burst.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Sentient tech merges with Corpus design to deliver this lethal sidearm. Fully automatic, it fires ricocheting, homing projectiles that release small clouds of <DT_GAS_COLOR>Gas on impact. Alt-fire to release the entire magazine without homing as a single burst.

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Hexenon
components.description:
A reagent commonly used to produce highly combustible fuel.

Location: Jupiter

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Cedo, Cyanex and Akarius causing a parried reaction (knock back) versus certain enemies.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Cyanex’s Alt Fire not being affected by Fire Rate Mods.
Fixed the Cyanex canceling heavy throw animations if your magazine is empty. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1123316-cyanex-glaives/

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Removed self damage from the Cyanex.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.2 + 25.0.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some weapons (Cyanex, Nagantaka) Fire Rates on their Burst mode showing as 0.
